item.title:
Coral: Bruce Millington reposteó Coral @Coral · 19h 𝐆𝐞𝐭 𝐌𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐜𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐡!
We invited Sean Bowen & Brendan Powell to a photoshoot
AKBets: AK BETS @AKBets · 20min Spot on. Cita Flynn Goward @flynngoward · 9h En respuesta a @chrisgambler247 @PricedUpBet y @Bet
item.description: AK BETS @AKBets · 20min Spot on. Cita Flynn Goward @flynngoward · 9h En respuesta a @chrisgambler247 @PricedUpBet y @BetGameCouncil I think it's forgotten that remote operators already conduct financial vulnerability checks at £150 of net losses in a 30 day period. It's not classed as an 'affordability check' - I guess because the word 'affordability' doesn't appear in the LCCP section - but it's already a 363

item.title:

item.description:
Sporting Life Racing reposteó Vicki Gibbins @vickigibbins101 · 9h Four become two, but which is the one?
Excellent headline work from the @SportingLife team - Godolphin Guineas prospects in the spotlight for today’s column. De sportinglife.com 2 5 1 mil

item.title: offtheball: John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 8h 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
item.description:
John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 8h 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
'You can't buy an audience! You can buy players, but you can't buy an audience!'
With the reports emerging that LIV Golf may be on it's last legs, @JohnDugganSport sums up exactly why he feels it has Mostrar más 1 1 3 4 mil
